line_2: When I within thy slender fence

line_1: And gaping wide received the weight immense:
line_2: Hurled from the awful steep with vehemence

line_1: Come! here’s a toast, (cried one, with roar immense):
line_2: “May none know pleasure that loves Common Sense.”

line_1: Now forms her Work too small, now too immense,
line_2: And scorns the Measures of our feeble Sense.
